resource.name: btnUpdateActivity.Hint
resource.object: Update process unit activity for this program

resource.name: RemoveAllTableItems
resource.object: Do you want to remove all items from the table?

resource.name: btnImport.Hint
resource.object: To load from file a list of programs for the current station

resource.name: btnExport.Hint
resource.object: To save to file the program list for the current station.

resource.name: Err.ImportFileFailed
resource.object: Failed to load program from file.

resource.name: Err.ExportFileFailed
resource.object: Failed to save program to file!

resource.name: Err.Closing
resource.object: Do you want to close the form and cancel the changes?

resource.name: NoFilename
resource.object: Filename can not be null or empty

resource.name: ProgramsMissing
resource.object: Programs section missing from the file

resource.name: ClearData.Txt
resource.object: Will clear both the view and monitor data from on server.\n\nDo you want to continue?

resource.name: chkAutoConnect.ToolTip
resource.object: If active then the program will try automatically to connect to the lane if the connection is down.

resource.name: chkDataPull.ToolTip
resource.object: If active then program will automatically pull for data from server.

resource.name: edHistorySize.ToolTip
resource.object: Set how many minutes backwards from current time to show.

resource.name: chkShowAsTabs.ToolTip
resource.object: Put each station of the system on it own tab

resource.name: lblLTotal.ToolTip
resource.object: Total number of bones and bonefree.

resource.name: lblRTotal.ToolTip
resource.object: Total number of bones and bonefree.

resource.name: lblThroughputMin.ToolTip
resource.object: Total number of piece through device in last 10 min.

resource.name: lblResolveErrors.ToolTip
resource.object: Number of data handling errors in Innova.

resource.name: lblXRayOn.ToolTip
resource.object: Total time the X-ray have been on.

resource.name: lblXRayOff.ToolTip
resource.object: Total time the X-ray have been off.

resource.name: lblLastCalibrated.ToolTip
resource.object: Time when SensorX was last calibrated.

resource.name: laneLookUp.ToolTip
resource.object: Select lane to show graph for

resource.name: selProgramLookUp.ToolTip
resource.object: To choose program to use for the station

resource.name: edSensorXPrg.ToolTip
resource.object: Sensitivity settings which is selected in SensorX

resource.name: PrgActivity.Confirm
resource.object: Do you want to change activity and choose program as:

resource.name: PrgActivity.NoAllowed
resource.object: You are not allowed to change activity!

resource.name: Err.DeletingStationChildren
resource.object: Can't delete children of the station

resource.name: Err.DeletingStationData
resource.object: Can't delete station. Station has data.

resource.name: Alarm.WrongDeviceType
resource.object: The selected device is not supported for alarm import.

resource.name: ProgramSchema.WrongDeviceType
resource.object: The selected device is not supported for program schema import.

resource.name: btnRefresh.Hint
resource.object: To request a status and data from server

resource.name: btnClear.Hint
resource.object: Clears monitor data both in UI and server

resource.name: btnConnect.Hint
resource.object: To requests a connection to station server

resource.name: selectSystem.Hint
resource.object: To choose a system to monitor stations on

resource.name: piecemode.hint
resource.object: Data from the machine will be stored as piece data even if the machine is running in flow mode.

resource.name: lblThroughputMin.ToolTip
resource.object: Total number of piece through device in last 10 min.

resource.name: colProgExists.ToolTip
resource.object: Indicates wether the program already exists in Innova and will be updated if selected

resource.name: ExportNoProductsInProgram
resource.object: Export failed. No products in program.

resource.name: ExportTooManyProductsInProgram
resource.object: Export failed. Too manu products in program.

resource.name: ImportProductNotFoundInSystem
resource.object: Import failed. Product not found in system.

resource.name: ImportProgramNotFoundInSystem
resource.object: Import failed. Program not found in system.

resource.name: ImportProgramNotFoundOnDevice
resource.object: Import failed. Program not found on device.

resource.name: ImportUnknown
resource.object: Import failed for an unknown reason.
